query:
CREATE TABLE `watchlist` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`symbol` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`companyName` varchar(256),
	`addedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `watchlist_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	INDEX `idx_watchlist_userId` (`userId`),
	UNIQUE INDEX `idx_watchlist_user_symbol` (`userId`, `symbol`)
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user wJDRLwTtNRAEr8y.root --database 59YG3qQDjh9GuPAJMBodTc --execute CREATE TABLE `watchlist` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`symbol` varchar(16) NOT NULL,
	`companyName` varchar(256),
	`addedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `watchlist_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	INDEX `idx_watchlist_userId` (`userId`),
	UNIQUE INDEX `idx_watchlist_user_symbol` (`userId`, `symbol`)
);
